name: Barbecued Chicken#2
recipeIngredient: ½ cup Chicken broth or water
Juice and rind of ½ Lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken and pat it dry.
2. Heat oil in a saucepan.
3. Add onion and garlic; sauté for 5 minutes.
4. Add remaining ingredients except chicken. Simmer 20-30 minutes.
5. Strain and set aside to cool.
6. With a sharp knife, make small cuts in the chicken pieces.
7. Spoon cooled barbecue sauce over chicken and let stand for at least ½ hour.
8. Heat broiler or grill.
9. Cook about 30-45 minutes, depending on size of chicken pieces. Baste frequently with barbecue sauce.
10. Test for doneness by pricking chicken with a skewer; if juice runs clear, chicken is done.
11. Heat remaining sauce and serve separately.
